title: Pan-Seared Chestnut Cutlets
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared cutlets with a crunchy chestnut crust.
instructions: Season the chicken cutlets with salt.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and add butter.
Sear the chicken cutlets for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix chopped chestnuts with parmesan and a pinch of salt.
Add the chestnut mixture to the pan and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Serve the chicken cutlets topped with the chestnut crust and garnish with parsley if desired.
